issues.description: First effect missing condition. Should have condition checking opponent has Character with 6000+ power
Second effect condition is 'Always' but should be 'HasCardOnBoard' or similar checking opponent's 6000+ power Character. 'Always' makes this unconditional GiveDon which contradicts card text
Third effect with trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. This appears to be a duplicate/malformed effect with no clear trigger point

Card text describes ONE conditional action with two phases: (1) Add 1 DON unconditionally, (2) IF opponent has 6000+ power Character, add 1 DON. DSL has three separate effects instead of proper conditional structure
